messages.content:
Describe a potential consequence of this vulnerability being exploited.

There's a flaw in binutils /bfd/pef.c. An attacker who is able to submit a crafted input file to be processed by the objdump program could cause a null pointer dereference. The greatest threat from this flaw is to application availability. This flaw affects binutils versions prior to 2.34.
If exploited, this vulnerability could cause the objdump program to crash, leading to a Denial of Service (DoS) condition, thus impacting the availability of the service utilizing this tool.
